description: BHN Market Intelligence — Regime, Equity, Sectors, Volatility, Bonds, Commodities ETFs, Macro, Sentiment, Earnings, Analyst Ratings, News

targets.rawSql: SELECT regime FROM market_regimes ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT vix FROM market_regimes ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT spy_vs_200ma FROM market_regimes ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT yield_curve FROM market_regimes ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT ROUND((confidence_score * 100)::numeric, 1) AS confidence FROM market_regimes ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, vix, spy_vs_200ma, yield_curve FROM market_regimes WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Regime History — VIX / SPY vs 200MA / Yield Curve (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(((curr.cpi - prev.cpi) / prev.cpi * 100)::numeric, 2) AS cpi FROM (SELECT cpi FROM macro_daily WHERE cpi IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) curr, (SELECT cpi FROM macro_daily WHERE cpi IS NOT NULL AND date <= NOW() - INTERVAL '11 months' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) prev;
SELECT fed_funds_rate FROM macro_daily WHERE fed_funds_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT unemployment FROM macro_daily WHERE unemployment IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT fear_greed_label FROM market_sentiment ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT fear_greed_index FROM market_sentiment ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, fed_funds_rate, yield_curve_10y2y, yield_curve_10y3m FROM macro_daily WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year' ORDER BY date ASC;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, fear_greed_index, put_call_ratio, insider_buy_sell_ratio FROM market_sentiment ORDER BY date ASC;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, dollar_index, high_yield_spread FROM macro_daily WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Dollar Index / High Yield Spread (1 Year)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, aaii_bull_pct, aaii_bear_pct, aaii_neutral_pct FROM market_sentiment ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: AAII Sentiment — Bull / Bear / Neutral (30 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, cpi, unemployment, consumer_sentiment FROM macro_daily WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year' ORDER BY date ASC;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, volume FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('VXX','UVIX','SVXY') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('VXX','UVIX','SVXY') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Volatility ETFs — VXX / UVIX / SVXY (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('SPY','QQQ','IWM','DIA') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Broad Market — SPY / QQQ / IWM / DIA (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('TQQQ','QLD','SOXL','TECL','FAS') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Leveraged Bull — TQQQ / QLD / SOXL / TECL / FAS (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('SQQQ','QID','PSQ') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Leveraged Bear / Inverse — SQQQ / QID / PSQ (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, rsi_14 FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('SPY','QQQ','IWM','TQQQ','SQQQ') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('XLK','XLF','XLE','XLV','XLU') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Sector ETFs — XLK / XLF / XLE / XLV / XLU (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, rsi_14 FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('XLK','XLF','XLE','XLV','XLU') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('TMF','BIL','JPST') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Fixed Income — TMF / BIL / JPST (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('UUP') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('GLD','SLV','USO','UNG') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Precious Metals & Energy — GLD / SLV / USO / UNG (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, ticker, close FROM market_daily WHERE ticker IN ('CORN','WEAT','SOYB') AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY date ASC;

panels.title: Agricultural ETFs — CORN / WEAT / SOYB (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol, period, eps_actual, eps_estimate, ROUND(surprise_pct::numeric, 2) AS surprise_pct FROM earnings_data ORDER BY period DESC, symbol ASC LIMIT 30;
SELECT period::timestamptz AS time, symbol, ROUND(surprise_pct::numeric, 2) AS surprise_pct FROM earnings_data WHERE surprise_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY period ASC;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, period, strong_buy, buy, hold, sell, strong_sell, ROUND((strong_buy + buy)::numeric / NULLIF(strong_buy + buy + hold + sell + strong_sell, 0) * 100, 1) AS bull_pct FROM analyst_data ORDER BY symbol, period DESC;
SELECT period::timestamptz AS time, symbol, ROUND((strong_buy + buy)::numeric / NULLIF(strong_buy + buy + hold + sell + strong_sell, 0) * 100, 1) AS bull_pct FROM analyst_data ORDER BY period ASC;

SELECT event_date, event_name, event_type, importance, expected_value, previous_value FROM market_events WHERE event_date BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY event_date ASC LIMIT 20;
SELECT published_at::date AS date, source, LEFT(title, 70) AS headline FROM news_articles ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 20;

title: BHN — Market Intelligence V5
